gaps: No test covers CCL (Call Control Layer) settings behavior during an active call — the bug is about CCL settings blinking instead of being locked/blocked. Test ID 65641606 covers 'Close Conversation Limiting' settings being locked/greyed out during a call, but this is a different setting (Conversation Limiter vs. Call Control Layer).

No test covers the specific UI behavior of CCL settings during an active call — whether they blink, flash, remain interactive, or become locked/greyed out. The existing test (65641606) covers a different setting's locked state but not CCL.

No test covers CCL settings persistence or state after call ends — if CCL settings were blinking/interactive during the call, does the value set during the call persist correctly after the call ends? This is a common bug pattern for settings persistence across Bluetooth state transitions (call active -> call ended).

generated_testcases.title: CCL Settings Locked/Greyed Out During Active Call
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap on the connected Poly device (e.g., Poly Sync 20, Voyager 5200, or Voyager 4320)
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Control Layer (CCL)
Verify CCL settings are visible and interactive (not greyed out) before the call
Note the current CCL setting value (e.g., 'On' or 'Off')
Place an active outgoing call from the paired smartphone (dial any number)
Once the call is connected, return to the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Control Layer (CCL)
Verify that all CCL settings are locked/greyed out and NOT blinking or flashing
Verify that the CCL setting value displayed matches the value noted before the call
Attempt to tap on any CCL toggle or control — verify no change occurs
generated_testcases.expected: CCL settings are locked/greyed out during an active call. Settings do NOT blink or flash. The displayed value matches the pre-call value. Tapping on CCL controls produces no change.

generated_testcases.title: CCL Settings Locked/Greyed Out During Incoming Active Call
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap on the connected Poly device
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Control Layer (CCL)
Verify CCL settings are interactive before the call
Note the current CCL setting value
Have a second phone call the paired smartphone
Answer the incoming call
While the call is active, return to the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Control Layer (CCL)
Verify that all CCL settings are locked/greyed out and NOT blinking or flashing
Verify the displayed CCL value matches the pre-call value
Attempt to toggle the CCL setting — verify no change occurs
generated_testcases.expected: CCL settings are locked/greyed out during an active incoming call. No blinking or flashing occurs. The displayed value is unchanged from the pre-call state. Tapping is ignored.

generated_testcases.title: CCL Settings Persistence After Call Ends — Value Set During Call Should Be Ignored
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap on the connected Poly device
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Control Layer (CCL)
Set CCL to 'Off' (or note the current state)
Place an active outgoing call from the paired smartphone
Once call is connected, return to the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Control Layer (CCL)
Verify CCL settings are locked/greyed out
End the call from the smartphone
Wait 5 seconds for the call state to fully disconnect
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Control Layer (CCL)
Verify CCL settings are now interactive (not greyed out)
Verify the CCL setting value is still 'Off' (the pre-call value) — i.e., any phantom taps during the call were ignored
Toggle CCL to 'On' and verify the change takes effect
generated_testcases.expected: After the call ends, CCL settings become interactive again. The value persists correctly as the pre-call value ('Off'). Any inadvertent taps during the call are ignored. The user can then change the setting normally.

generated_testcases.title: CCL Settings Blinking/Flashing UI Verification During Active Call
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap on the connected Poly device
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Control Layer (CCL)
Take a screenshot of the CCL settings UI as a baseline
Place an active call from the paired smartphone
Once call is connected, return to the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Control Layer (CCL)
Observe the CCL settings UI for 10 seconds — watch for any blinking, flashing, or intermittent visibility of CCL controls
Take a screenshot of the CCL settings UI during the call
Compare the two screenshots — verify the CCL controls appear identical (same greyed-out/locked state, no visual artifacts)
Verify that no CCL control toggles, animates, or changes opacity during the observation period
generated_testcases.expected: CCL settings UI is stable during the active call — no blinking, flashing, opacity changes, or animation of any CCL controls. The UI appears identical to the baseline screenshot except for the locked/greyed-out state.

generated_testcases.title: CCL Settings During Call — Rapid Call Start/Stop Cycle
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap on the connected Poly device
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Control Layer (CCL)
Set CCL to 'On'
Place an active call from the paired smartphone
Once connected, verify CCL settings are locked/greyed out
End the call
Immediately (within 2 seconds) place another call from the paired smartphone
While the second call is connecting, navigate to Audio Settings → Call Control Layer (CCL)
Verify CCL settings remain locked/greyed out during call setup phase
Once the second call is connected, verify CCL settings are still locked/greyed out and NOT blinking
End the second call
Wait 5 seconds
Return to Audio Settings → Call Control Layer (CCL)
Verify CCL settings are interactive and the value is still 'On'
generated_testcases.expected: CCL settings remain locked/greyed out during both calls and the call setup phase. No blinking occurs. After the rapid call cycle ends, CCL settings return to interactive state with the correct persisted value ('On').

generated_testcases.title: CCL Settings Locked State During Call — Slider and Toggle Interaction Attempt
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Tap on the connected Poly device
Navigate to Audio Settings → Call Control Layer (CCL)
Verify CCL has interactive controls (toggles, sliders, or dropdowns depending on device)
Place an active call from the paired smartphone
Once call is connected, navigate to Audio Settings → Call Control Layer (CCL)
Verify CCL controls are greyed out/locked
Attempt to drag any CCL slider (if present) — verify slider does not move
Attempt to tap any CCL toggle — verify toggle does not change state
Attempt to tap any CCL dropdown/selector — verify no dropdown appears
While still on the CCL screen, end the call from the smartphone
Wait 5 seconds
Verify CCL controls become interactive again without needing to navigate away and back
Verify the CCL value is unchanged from the pre-call value
generated_testcases.expected: All CCL control types (sliders, toggles, dropdowns) are non-interactive during the call. After the call ends, controls become interactive in real-time without navigation refresh. The pre-call value is preserved.
